tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set service "PING" "HTTP"
    next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set service "PING" "HTTP"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Ubuntu-Restricted-Outbound"
        set uuid ee271f36-2b58-51f1-af5f-d9921c916b9c
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING" "HTTP"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
